tools.name: caseClassifications.cloudsupportCaseClassificationsSearch
tools.description: Retrieve valid classifications to be used when creating a support case. The classications are hierarchical, with each classification containing all levels of the hierarchy, separated by " > ". For example "Technical Issue > Compute > Compute Engine".

tools.name: cases.cloudsupportCasesAttachmentsList
tools.description: Retrieve all attachments associated with a support case.

tools.name: cases.cloudsupportCasesCommentsCreate
tools.description: Add a new comment to the specified Case. The comment object must have the following fields set: body.

tools.name: cases.cloudsupportCasesCommentsList
tools.description: Retrieve all Comments associated with the Case object.

tools.name: cases.cloudsupportCasesCreate
tools.description: Create a new case and associate it with the given Cloud resource. The case object must have the following fields set: display_name, description, classification, and severity.

tools.name: cases.cloudsupportCasesEscalate
tools.description: Escalate a case. Escalating a case will initiate the Cloud Support escalation management process. This operation is only available to certain Customer Care tiers. Go to https://cloud.google.com/support and look for 'Technical support escalations' in the feature list to find out which tiers are able to perform escalations.

tools.name: cases.cloudsupportCasesList
tools.description: Retrieve all cases under the specified parent. Note: Listing cases under an Organization returns only the cases directly parented by that organization. To retrieve all cases under an organization, including cases parented by projects under that organization, use `cases.search`.

tools.name: cases.cloudsupportCasesPatch
tools.description: Update the specified case. Only a subset of fields can be updated.

tools.name: cases.cloudsupportCasesSearch
tools.description: Search cases using the specified query.

tools.name: media.cloudsupportMediaDownload
tools.description: Download a file attachment on a case. Note: HTTP requests must append "?alt=media" to the URL.

tools.name: media.cloudsupportMediaUpload
tools.description: Create a file attachment on a case or Cloud resource. The attachment object must have the following fields set: filename.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
